title: Refactor: extract a shared helper without changing behavior
prompt: The file `stats.mjs` exports `mean(nums)` and `variance(nums)`, both of which duplicate the summation logic. Refactor by extracting a `sum(nums)` helper and exporting it too, then use it inside both functions. Behavior of mean and variance must not change.

grade.command: node -e "import('./stats.mjs').then(m=>{if(typeof m.sum!=='function')throw new Error('sum not exported');if(m.sum([1,2,3])!==6)throw new Error('bad sum');if(m.mean([2,4,6])!==4)throw new Error('bad mean');if(m.variance([1,2,3])!==0.6666666666666666)throw new Error('bad variance '+m.variance([1,2,3]));console.log('ok')})"
